product.name: ArWoWear T5 Chem Pro
product.categorySourceGroup: Vat Dyed Workwear Fabrics Resistant to Industrial Chemicals
product.titleDescriptor: 65% Polyester 35% Cotton, Chemical Resistant Fabric, 245 gr/m'2
product.specLine: 245 g/m², 65% Polyester 35% Cotton, VAT Dyed, Chemical Resistant, 3/1S Twill Fabric
descriptions: ArWoWear T5 Chem Pro is light weight 245 g/m², vat dyed, chemical resistant,65% polyester 35% cotton merserized workwear fabric.
It is usefull for outdoor summer hard working conditions.
Water and oil repellent (TS EN ISO 4920) function.
Resistant to most industrial chemicals. (EN ISO 13034)
65% Polyester 35% Cotton, Chemical Resistant Fabric, 245 gr/m'2
245 g/m², 65% Polyester 35% Cotton, VAT Dyed, Chemical Resistant, 3/1S Twill Fabric
technicalParameters: Tensile Strength | Warp>1000N; Weft>800N | EN ISO 13934-1
Tear Strength | Warp>20N; Weft>15N | EN ISO 13937-2
Dimensional Change | -3% < Length < +3% ; -3% < Width < +3% | EN ISO 5077
Dry Cleaning Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 D01
Hot Press Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 X11
Perspiration Light Fast. | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 B07
Azo Test | No Azo Colorants. | EN ISO 14362-1

possibleButNotAccepted.reason: Product lists an 'emi' property (EMI shielding) which could relate to electrical/electronic environments, but no explicit statement of energy-sector or electrical-utility use is given; property alone is insufficient per rules.
Chemical resistant workwear could plausibly be used in industrial metal processing, but no explicit welding, foundry or metallurgy use is stated.

modelOutput.noMatchReason: This product is explicitly described as a chemical-resistant workwear fabric (coveralls) intended for general industrial chemical protection, water/oil repellency, and outdoor working conditions.
